name: Dep-Hallucinator
applicability: Detects AI-hallucinated package names in dependency files. Directly applicable to SoNash npm dependency management.
home_connection: No current SoNash mitigation for hallucinated dependencies. This tool addresses the gap.

name: TruffleHog
applicability: Secrets scanning tool. We use patterns:check for some secret detection but TruffleHog is more comprehensive.
home_connection: Could complement our existing .env exclusion patterns in .gitignore and patterns:check.

name: SonarQube/SonarCloud
applicability: Static analysis for code quality and security. Already integrated via SonarCloud CI.
home_connection: Already in use — validates our approach.

name: Vibe Engineering concept
applicability: Planning and documentation before AI code generation to reduce requirements ambiguity.
home_connection: Aligns with our deep-plan and brainstorm skills. Validates the approach.

name: 53 academic citations
applicability: Bibliography not fully extracted. Would need original PDF bibliography page for individual citation evaluation.
